title: 12.  Symptoms of flu like, myalgia, fatigue, weakness and lethargy

BLEEDING    &    BLOODLETTING
Another approach we can use is blooding or bloodletting.
Since bloodletting is a good detoxification method and balances the inflammatory
pathways, through known and unknown mechanisms, mostly with the aim of
relieving blood stasis, sometimes in some cases, it has been the only way of
salvation.
However, there are two types of blood sampling :

Precautions
(Prohibition of bloodletting)
 General weakness
 Uncontrolled diabetes
 Taking anticoagulants
 Blood disorders such as hemophilia
 Old age with thin and sensitive skin and spontaneous purpura
 Pregnancy
(In pregnancy, only bloodletting from DT.03 is allowed. It is also for
nausea.)
39 | P a g e
 BLG  from conventional cupping area and 1.5 cm on both sides, also known
as DT.07 (around BL 13), will be very good and effective for respiratory
problems and detoxification.
It is best taken before the bloodletting, do cupping.
Tip; It is noteworthy that if before blood sampling, you can find sensitive and tender
points areas by touching and palpation, the operation will be more effective.
40 | P a g e
 BLG  from  DT.01  and  DT.02 ;
Bloodletting from this area has a great effect on detoxification of any kind of
poisoning.
(Food, medicine, bites, radiation, and in general any poisoning and high levels of
harmful external factors that have entered the blood, such as viruses and its harmful
compartments.
41 | P a g e
 BLG  of small, bluish, prominent veins visible in the lateral leg
(prominent or twisted varicose veins are not considered)
Bloodletting from this area of the Tung (lung area) can have a significant effect on
reducing the symptoms of respiratory and pulmonary problems as well as heart
disease in patients.
Bloodletting is done using 18-20 needles.
42 | P a g e
43 | P a g e

45 | P a g e
 BLG  from area 11.26 (Zhi Wu)
This area is located on the midline of the dorsal proximal Phalanx of the thumb.
Bloodletting from this area is useful if there are prominent veins.
This area has a great impact on the healing and repair of any wounds and
Internal and external infections of the body (Such as; lung tissue damage)
46 | P a g e
 BLG  from the eardrum (preferably the apex of helix of  the ear)
With a surgical blade, a few superficial scratches are made on the earlobe, preferably
the apex of the ears.
A few drops of blood are enough.
As mentioned, among the favorable locations in the image, the most therapeutic
effect is favorable in Bloodletting from the apex.
This Bloodletting is quick, easy, and harmless, but it can be miraculous given the
wide range of clinical effects.
From; fever, headache, high blood pressure to many inflammatory factors in the
upper half of the body.
In general, any problem in the body that is above the level of the T 12 vertebrae may
respond well to blood draws from the ears.
